open_prs.title: [Test Improver] Add error-path, edge-case, and thread-safety tests
open_prs.note: 42 new tests; coverage 92→97%. Review comments addressed 3 times (14:02, 14:41, 16:28 on 2026-04-27).

maintainer_priorities: CRITICAL: Test Improver MUST read and address code review comments on its own PRs before the maintainer needs to ask.
Per nocarryr comment on PR #86: 'make the [Test Improver] agentic workflow do its job and read the code reviews here. I'm going to delete it otherwise'
nocarryr dislikes section-separator comments (--- style) in test files
nocarryr wants pytest fixtures used for repetitive test setup (but plain module-level helpers when fixture injection is not needed)
nocarryr: pull inner factory functions out as module-level helpers with explicit args, not fixtures, when tests below cannot use fixture injection
nocarryr wants type: ignore avoided and clean type annotations
nocarryr: use ensure_* functions from lupy.typeutils instead of type: ignore where the array IS the right shape/type but mypy cannot narrow it
nocarryr: use NumChannelsT TypeVar and Meter[NumChannelsT] generic return type for factory helpers
checked_off_items: PR #86 (closed by maintainer; [x] checked in monthly summary)
